title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 371.140 - Development finance corporations subject to chapter 351 and have corporate powers and rights
text:
371.140.  Development finance corporations subject to chapter 351 and have corporate powers and rights. — All development finance corporations shall possess all powers and privileges granted corporations by chapter 351 relating to general business corporations and are subject to all the provisions thereof except as herein otherwise provided.
(L. 1961 p. 157 § 12)
